register.title: Register
agreementParagraphs: Membership and Service Agreement Declaration
Every player is obliged to keep their account information confidential.

Only the owner of the email address to which the account is registered can use that account (accounts cannot be shared, sold, transferred, or jointly used). Capo2 will not be responsible for returning items lost or stolen.

The use and knowledge of account information by another person is entirely your responsibility. (Attempting to sell an account, sharing it, downloading files from places like Skype or Facebook and similar platforms, clicking links provided by individuals, entering fake sites provided by individuals and entering your information in forms there, buying an account or attempting to do so, using an account you purchased.) This situation means that Clause 1 of the game agreement — not keeping account information confidential, not taking responsibility for it, and sharing or trading accounts as described below — has been violated. Accordingly, when you submit a ticket claiming theft, the account you claim was stolen and all accounts belonging to the other party will be permanently suspended. You will not receive an account refund. (This is the situation you have fallen into by ignoring our warnings, and it means you have committed a rule violation.)
If you find a bug and use it to gain an advantage, your game account will be permanently suspended.
All found game and programming exploits must be immediately reported to the game team via the Support System.
It would be beneficial to keep in mind that inappropriate behavior displayed on any of the services (Facebook, Youtube, Forum, IRC, etc.) may result in in-game penalties.
As the Capo2 team, 'we' reserve the right to make changes/revisions to the game rules at any time without any announcement or notice.
General Terms of Use supersede the rules and apply together with the rules in their entirety.
No player may threaten other players with real-life harm or force them into real-life actions in any game environment.

Threats related to the game are outside the scope of this clause. It is strictly prohibited to find any player, team member, officer, or anyone related to game services in any way and make implications or statements suggesting harm will come to them.
The official language of Capo2 servers is Turkish. Game Servers, Forum, and official IRC channels are subject to this rule, but this rule is not limited to these areas only.

The use of rude/slang language and profanity in chat is prohibited. Spam (repeated repetition of the same message), sharing links other than game and forum links, cheat advertising, cheat requests, yang sale advertisements, etc. are prohibited.
Appeals against game team decisions can only be made through the Support System.
You must report an issue by opening a single ticket through the support system.
Writing repeatedly on the same ticket before receiving a reply will serve no purpose other than delaying your response time.
Actions such as attempting to sell, selling, and buying user accounts and game materials for real money are strictly prohibited. No user has the right to do so.
As a result of detailed investigations, the accounts of users engaged in such activities will be permanently suspended!
If you think a player is acting against the rules, record a video and report it to the administration through the Support System within 2 days at the latest.

Otherwise your complaint will not be processed. Therefore, do not close the date display in the upper left corner of the game! The server name on the right side of the game must definitely be visible. Otherwise, your complaint will also not be processed for this reason. The Capo2 team will review your complaint and decide whether there has been a rule violation and, if necessary, will apply the sanctions specified in the penalty system.
If you think a game administrator is acting against the rules, you can forward this along with the relevant evidence to a higher authority via ticket.
Trading items with credits & TL is prohibited. When users who make and receive such sales are detected, their character will be permanently suspended.

Users who send credits & TL to someone making such sales and do not receive their item, or vice versa give the item and do not receive credits & TL, cannot claim any rights from Capo2 management. (For this reason, players and/or players — guilds or communities whose accounts are restricted — cannot legally claim any rights and cannot file criminal complaints.)
Capo2 administrators can open or close user accounts without reason. This discretion lies with the administrators.

In cases of legal requests, in situations of legal compliance against the game, its website, the company it is affiliated with or its affiliated partners, in order to protect and defend the rights of the game and the company, in extraordinary or emergency situations, and in operations to protect the safety of the company, the game, and the public, personal information may be disclosed.
Every registered user agrees to comply with the game rules and acknowledges that their account will be suspended if they do not comply.
Every registered user undertakes that they have read the above items, will comply with them, and accepts the user agreement!
Capo2 reserves the right to change these rules at any time without notice.
If you have any questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us using the information below.
